articles.title: Building Modern Web Applications
articles.content: Learn how to build modern, responsive web applications using the latest technologies and best practices. This comprehensive guide covers everything from setup to deployment.
articles.excerpt: Explore the latest techniques and best practices for creating responsive, performant web applications.
articles.author: John Doe

articles.title: Designing for Accessibility
articles.content: Accessibility is crucial for creating inclusive digital experiences. Learn the principles and practices that make your applications usable by everyone, regardless of their abilities.
articles.excerpt: Learn how to make your applications accessible to everyone with inclusive design principles.
articles.author: Jane Smith

articles.title: Securing Your Code
articles.content: Security should be built into your development process from day one. This guide covers essential security practices, from code review to deployment pipelines.
articles.excerpt: Best practices for keeping your codebase secure and protecting against vulnerabilities.
articles.author: Alex Johnson
